Triton Database — Overview

Triton Database is a relational database optimised for analytical queries over large fact tables. It uses a columnar storage engine, vectorised execution, and a cost-based optimiser to plan SELECT queries efficiently. Tables, columns, indexes, and views are the primary schema objects. Triton Database is a SQL-92 compliant relational engine with vectorised columnar execution. Triton Database tables, columns, indexes, views, primary keys, and foreign keys are the schema objects exposed to operators.
